/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX12.0.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=11.6 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../vterm-module.so CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/vterm-module.c.o CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/utf8.c.o CMakeFiles/vterm-module.dir/elisp.c.o  /usr/local/lib/libvterm.dylib
